reason_superseded: Pre-v4 output retained only for historical audit. Contains tau_c_min_us=27.7 from v3.0 model (no pulse dephasing). Canonical live threshold is 292 µs (v3.3). This file MUST NOT be used as live gate logic.

original_v3_content.note: Post-bakeout MC (Mode D only). tau_c log-U[1ns,100ms]. d/T2*/C_contr independent — pass rate overestimated. C_contr@10mK and tau_c: EXPERIMENTAL VALIDATION REQUIRED. G_eff: ASSUMED from Kapitza model, not measured.
